title: MIMU-025 Become a refugee on a business trip and stay overnight at a business hotel with a cute subordinate!
overview: Due to bad weather, transportation stops at the business trip destination! I kill time at an izakaya with a cute junior, but there is no prospect of recovery, so the two of us stay at a business hotel. The chest of juniors who are drunk and defenseless ... I will not miss the crotch that has become slightly loose on a business trip! Accept my caresses so that the boyfriend on the other side of the phone won't hear if I try to mess with him when my junior calls my boyfriend.
